title: elaeocarpus tectorius
intro: Elaeocarpus tectorius, also known as the Blue Granite or Sea Chestnut, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus tectorius include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
